Add `superseded` status handling in relevant functions:\\n   - `get_ready_drops()` should skip superseded Drops\\n   - `update_status_md()` should show superseded Drops in a separate section\\n\\n4. The logic should:\\n   - Default to all Drops if no `hypothesis_group` is specified\\n   - Only supersede pending/running Drops (not already complete/failed/dead)\\n   - Log when Drops are superseded\\n\\nHere's the specific implementation to add:\", \"code_edit\": \"I'll add the check_first_wins function after the existing helper functions and before the tick function, and then modify the relevant functions to support superseded status.\\n\\nFirst, I'll add the check_first_wins function after the existing helper functions (around line 300, after advance_stream):\\n\\n```python\\ndef check_first_wins(slug: str, meta: dict) -> bool:\\n    \\\"\\\"\\\"Check if a hypothesis was confirmed and supersede others.\\\"\\\"\\\"\\n    if not meta.get(\\\"first_wins\\\"):\\n        return False\\n    \\n    hypothesis_group = meta.get(\\\"hypothesis_group\\\") or list(meta.get(\\\"drops\\\", {}).keys())\\n    \\n    # Find confirmed hypothesis\\n    winner = None\\n    for drop_id in hypothesis_group:\\n        deposit = get_deposit(slug, drop_id)\\n        if deposit and deposit.get(\\\"verdict\\\") == \\\"confirmed\\\":\\n            winner = drop_id\\n            break\\n    \\n    if not winner:\\n        return False\\n    \\n    # Supersede others\\n    drops = meta.get(\\\"drops\\\", {})\\n    superseded_count = 0\\n    for drop_id in hypothesis_group:\\n        if drop_id == winner:\\n            continue\\n        if drops[drop_id].get(\\\"status\\\") in (\\\"pending\\\", \\\"running\\\"):\\n            drops[drop_id][\\\"status\\\"] = \\\"superseded\\\"\\n            drops[drop_id][\\\"superseded_by\\\"] = winner\\n            drops[drop_id][\\\"superseded_at\\\"] = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()\\n            superseded_count += 1\\n            print(f\\\"[FIRST_WINS] {drop_id} superseded by {winner}\\\")\\n    \\n    if superseded_count > 0:\\n        save_meta(slug, meta)\\n        print(f\\\"[FIRST_WINS] {superseded_count} Drops superseded by {winner}\\\")\\n        return True\\n    \\n    return False\\n```\\n\\nNext, I'll modify the tick function to call check_first_wins after processing deposits (around line 350, after the deposit processing loop):\\n\\n```python\\n    # Add this after processing deposits in tick function\\n    # 1.5. Check for first-wins hypothesis racing\\n    if check_first_wins(slug, meta):\\n        broadcasts_updated = True  # Status will be updated\\n```\\n\\nThen I'll modify get_ready_drops to skip superseded Drops (around line 200, in the loop where it checks status != \\\"pending\\\"):\\n\\n```python\\n        if info.get(\\\"status\\\") not in (\\\"pending\\\",):\\n            continue\\n```\\n\\nAnd modify update_status_md to show superseded Drops (around line 150, add superseded section):\\n\\n```python\\n    superseded = [d for d, info in drops.items() if info.get(\\\"status\\\") == \\\"superseded\\\"]\\n```\\n\\nThen in the content template, add the superseded section after the \\\"## Pending\\\" section.\\n\\nLet me make these specific changes to the file.\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_0186HFqgSZMTaynMYcrUKoZu","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":55878,"cache_write_tokens":110,"cache_read_tokens":55766,"output_tokens":1017,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":110,"cache_read_input_tokens":55766,"input_tokens":2,"output_tokens":1017}},"model_name":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","timestamp":"2026-02-08T00:48:27.002942Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"3700edcc-9785-4dee-9530-ad4a440293d9","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Operator"},"provider_response_id":"msg_01HkkzEB999ja211ivbwdHzJ","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"7cb64192-d98f-414c-989f-9f8d03fa33a8","metadata":null}
